projects.title: Pune Built a multi-agent market research system using CrewAI, coordinating 5 spe
projects.description: Pune Built a multi-agent market research system using CrewAI, coordinating 5 specialized agents (market research, competitive intelligence, strategy, market sizing, report synthesis) for end-to-end business analysis Implemented task-based agent orchestration with parallel execution and static + dynamic web scraping using Selenium and HTML parsing to collect real-time market and competitor data Automated generation of actionable market intelligence reports (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitive landscape, growth trends, go-to-market strategy) to enable startup and investment decision-making SocialFlow AILink Dec '25 — Jan '26 Pune, India Multi-Agent GenAI Content Automation Platform Reduced content creation time by ~70% by building a multi- agent LangGraph workflow for parallel LinkedIn, Twitter, and WhatsApp post generation Improved throughput by 3× using stateful agent orchestration, with HITL approval via Streamlit for review and publishing Developed an end-to-end LLM pipeline using Hugging Face Inference APIs with <3s latency, integrating Langsmith for request tracing, debugging, and performance monitoring
projects.raw_text: Pune Built a multi-agent market research system using CrewAI, coordinating 5 specialized agents (market research, competitive intelligence, strategy, market sizing, report synthesis) for end-to-end business analysis Implemented task-based agent orchestration with parallel execution and static + dynamic web scraping using Selenium and HTML parsing to collect real-time market and competitor data Automated generation of actionable market intelligence reports (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitive landscape, growth trends, go-to-market strategy) to enable startup and investment decision-making SocialFlow AILink Dec '25 — Jan '26 Pune, India Multi-Agent GenAI Content Automation Platform Reduced content creation time by ~70% by building a multi- agent LangGraph workflow for parallel LinkedIn, Twitter, and WhatsApp post generation Improved throughput by 3× using stateful agent orchestration, with HITL approval via Streamlit for review and publishing Developed an end-to-end LLM pipeline using Hugging Face Inference APIs with <3s latency, integrating Langsmith for request tracing, debugging, and performance monitoring
